Preference.app:title: Accessibility Settings
Preference.app:summary: Open device settings to manage the Volume Buttons Mapper service

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Bypass while Volume Panel is Open
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Temporarily disable custom actions when the system volume dialog is visible

Preference.app:title: Do Not Disturb Access
Preference.app:summary: Required for the DND toggle feature

Preference.app:title: Modify System Settings Permission
Preference.app:summary: Required for screen brightness and auto-rotate features

Preference.app:title: Bluetooth Permission
Preference.app:summary: Required for direct Bluetooth toggle feature

Preference.app:title: Reset to Default
Preference.app:summary: Clear all settings and revert to normal phone defaults
